_comment:
Romanian landing-page content. Split into two kinds of keys:
  - landing_tl_*  : target-language strings that WILL be spoken aloud (TTS audio generated for these).
  - landing_*     : interface copy that overlays the engine's en.json — translated per UI language.
  The audio generator scans landing.*.json for all tl_ keys.
_section_interface: === Interface copy (overlays engine src/locales/en.json for RO context) ===
landing_speak_subtitle: Don't just read it — say the sounds. You'll be surprised what your mouth already knows.
landing_speak_followup: That's it. That's the whole secret. Now imagine doing this for ninety-nine more sentences, ordered into a system. That's the course.
landing_loss_title: Most people who decide to learn Romanian never do.
landing_loss_body: They download an app. They learn "hello" and "thank you." They lose the streak after eight days. Three years later, they still stumble on a basic phone call. This is the part where you decide if you want to be one of them.
landing_timeline_milestone_4: A real conversation — without thinking about grammar.
_section_tl: === Target-language strings — these ARE spoken aloud, audio is generated for them ===
